name: mirage-vault
description: Privacy layer for LLM interactions — browse your redacted vault sessions with all sensitive data safely masked as tokens.

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List all MCP-shared vault sessions with item and entry counts

tools.name: get_session
tools.description: Get full masked session content with entries, items, and entity summary

tools.name: get_session_item
tools.description: Get a specific item from a session with masked content and entity list

tools.name: get_entity_legend
tools.description: Get the token-to-entity-type mapping for a session

tools.name: get_masked_item
tools.description: Get a standalone masked vault item by ID

passphrase.title: Vault Passphrase
passphrase.description: The passphrase used to encrypt your vault. Required to decrypt session entries.

database_path.title: Database Path
database_path.description: Path to the vault SQLite database file. Leave empty to use the default location.
